title: `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.columns` performance regression after fix #54343
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE t2 (t1_id Int32, value Decimal(10, 2));
INSERT INTO t2 (t1_id, value) SELECT id, ROUND(rand() * 100, 2) FROM t1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system.columns WHERE table = 't1';
